prompt: [Person] Image 1, Image 2 [Pose and expression of the person] In a low-angle pose looking down at the camera, the right hand is stretched long in front of the camera lens to hold the [product in Image 3] with great emphasis. The left hand is raised to shoulder height with fingers slightly spread, and looks straight ahead with a refreshing and lively expression with the mouth slightly open. [Character Outfit] Wearing a ribbed knit sleeveless top similar in color to the [Image 3] product. A lightweight top that gives a refreshing summer feel, highlighting the person's shoulder and arm lines to emphasize a fresh seasonal look. [Character Hair and Makeup Details] Long brown straight hair styled to look wet and moist is naturally swept back. Makeup is based on a transparent and moist skin expression, with lively pink blush applied widely on both cheeks to add a juicy look, and lips finished with a moist texture with natural vitality. [Lighting and Light Direction] Intense and bright midday natural light from a clear outdoor setting shines directly on the front of the person and the skincare product. Strong sunlight passes through the transparent cosmetic container, creating clear highlights and brightly illuminating the person's features and skin texture without shadows. [Texture and Color Mood] The blue of the sky and the refreshing mint color of the outfit and product harmonize to create an extremely cool and clean summer mood. The fine bubble texture inside the serum container, the smooth container surface texture, the dense ribbed fabric texture of the outfit, and the gloss of the moist skin are vividly expressed. [Film and Camera Lens Depth, Angle] Photographed from an extreme low-angle 'worm's-eye view' looking up at the sky from the ground. Using a very shallow depth of field, the cosmetic bottle located directly in front of the camera is captured very large and clearly, while the person's face and body located behind are softly out-of-focused and blurred. [Background Elements (Optional)] A clear and clean summer blue sky with almost no clouds fills the entire screen as the background. Only in the lower right part is a very soft part of a white cumulus cloud slightly hung, making it a minimalist outdoor background that further enhances the refreshing colors of the person and product.
